title: Ontario farmers embrace extreme heat after weeks of storms, hail damage crops
description: Farmers in southwestern Ontario say that weeks of extreme weather events, including torrential rain and hail, has made growing crops a challenge. Some say they're embracing a week of hot temperatures, which can help crops get healthy.
content:
Some southwestern Ontario farmers are celebrating as intense heat blankets the region, calling it a welcome change after an unpredictable start to the growing season. 
Last Thursday, a severe thunde… [+3781 chars]

Landwirte im Südwesten Ontarios sagen, dass wochenlange extreme Wetterereignisse, darunter sintflutartige Regenfälle und Hagel, den Pflanzenanbau zu einer Herausforderung gemacht haben. Einige sagen, dass sie sich auf eine Woche mit heißen Temperaturen freuen, was dazu beitragen kann, dass die Pflanzen gesund werden.
en: Ontario farmers embrace extreme heat after weeks of storms, hail damage crops. Farmers in southwestern Ontario say that weeks of extreme weather events, including torrential rain and hail, has made growing crops a challenge. Some say they're embracing a week of hot temperatures, which can help crops get healthy.
la: Ontario agricolae calorem maximum post septimanas tempestatum amplectuntur, grando fruges laedunt. Quidam dicunt se septem temperaturas calidas amplecti, quae adiuvant fruges sanos fieri.

title: Kick-off in England's clash with Mexico is DELAYED by thunderstorms in blow for Three Lions stars and millions at home watching through the night
description: Rules dictate a match must be suspended if lightning strikes anywhere within an eight-mile radius of the stadium. The game then cannot resume until there are no further strikes in the area for 30 minutes.
content:
The kick-off time in England's last-16 clash with Mexico at the World Cup has been delayed by one hour because of thunderstorms in Mexico City.
Supporters already at the stadium have desperately sou… [+5448 chars]
de: Der Anpfiff im Spiel Englands gegen Mexiko wird durch Gewitter verzögert, die die Stars der Three Lions und Millionen zu Hause die ganze Nacht über heimsuchen. Die Regeln schreiben vor, dass ein Spiel unterbrochen werden muss, wenn irgendwo im Umkreis von acht Meilen um das Stadion ein Blitz einschlägt. Das Spiel kann dann nicht fortgesetzt werden, bis es 30 Minuten lang zu keinen weiteren Angriffen in der Gegend kommt.
en: Kick-off in England's clash with Mexico is DELAYED by thunderstorms in blow for Three Lions stars and millions at home watching through the night. Rules dictate a match must be suspended if lightning strikes anywhere within an eight-mile radius of the stadium. The game then cannot resume until there are no further strikes in the area for 30 minutes.
la: Calcitrare in Anglia cum Mexici concursu in ictu per tres Leones stellas et decies centena milia domi per noctem vigilantes moratur. Praecepta par dictant suspendendum est, si fulgur alicubi intra octo miliaria stadii radium feriat. Ludus igitur non potest resumere donec nullae amplius feriantur in area per 30 minuta.
